case_title: SILVER CYBER TECH., INC. et al VS. MERCI NIEBRES

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRTG PLTFFS' MOTION TO DISMISS DEFTS' APPEAL OF THE ORDERS, DECISIONS OR AWARDS OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER
MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JUL-01-2002 VACATED, MOTION TO DISMISS APPEAL GRANTED, JUDGMENT ENTERED.

NOTICE OF APPEAL OF THE ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY APPELLANT SILVER CYBER TECH., INC. AS JOINT EMPLOYER ST. JOHN, EL AN INDIVIDUAL, AS JOINT EMPLOYER AS TO RESPONDENT NIEBRES, MERCI JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

ARGUED AND THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE FOR ALL PURPOSES UNDER LEAD CASE NUMBER 405393 WITH THE FOLLOWING CASE NUMBERS INCLUDED IN INSTANT MOTION: 404034, 404035, 404040/404039, 404047/404045, 404264, 404265, 404274, 404275, 404276, 404290, 404304; AND WITH THE FOLLOWING CASE NUMBERS NOT SUBJECT TO INSTANT MOTION: 405393, 405396, 405407, 405413, 405402, 405399, 405398, 405410, 404271; ALL CASES CONSOLIDATED UNDER #405393 PER NOTICED MOTION AND PER COURT'S OWN MOTION UNDER CCP 1048, SO STIPULATED BY COUNSEL. DEFT TO PREPARE ORDER. IN ADDITION, MOTION TO DISMISS IS CONTINUED TO 05/07/02 UNDER #405393. DEFT TO FILE SUPPLEMENTAL SUPPORTING PAPERS RE INDIGENCE BY 04/25; RESPONSE DUE 05/01. DEFT TO PREPARE ORDER. REPORTER: SUSAN CROZIER.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE MAILED (LABOR APPEAL) (LABOR APPEAL COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUN-24-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: RECOVER FROM APPELLANT SILVER CYBER TECH., INC. AS JOINT EMPLOYER ST. JOHN, EL AN INDIVIDUAL, AS JOINT EMPLOYER $13,179.99 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,179.99, SEE SCANNED DOC
MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JUN-24-2002 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON JUL-01-2002 AT 9:30 AM IN 206
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO RESPONDENT NIEBRES, MERCI
